helpful: Provisioned petition and complete brief in opposition
gaps: The remote corpus endpoint was unreachable, so the query returned no historical priors

notes: The docket snapshot and complete BIO were sufficient for a reasoned forecast despite the failed remote corpus lookup. A sanctioned Supreme Court docket-status lookup for related or lead cases would materially improve calibration of apparent holds.
